topic.title: Making a request with the Test Corp. NA API
topic.shortdesc: This article demonstrates how to make an authenticated prayer request to the Test Corp. divinity API using LITURGY.

section.title: 1. Setup
section.p: Install LITURGY on Windows or Linux. LITURGY is not currently available on macOS. For more information, see Seminary Education.

ol.li: Authenticate by running the following command in terminal: gh auth login
Choose an endpoint for your prayer request. These include God, Mother Mary, and deceased ancestors. For more options, explore the full API documentation.
Identify the HTTP method and path of the endpoint.

section.title: Send an outgoing message to God
section.p: To send an outgoing message, send a POST request.
